sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_table (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO dates_table (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-09-20');
UPDATE dates_table SET event_date = DATE '2000-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT extract('year' FROM event_date) AS event_year FROM dates_table;
SELECT id, event_date, extract('month' FROM event_date) AS event_month FROM dates_table WHERE extract('year' FROM event_date) = 1992;
